entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: Speaker, founder of Careerspan discussing candidate evaluation methodology

entities.name: Semantic evaluation
entities.context: Approach that evaluates candidates based on meaning and understanding rather than keywords

entities.name: Keyword evaluation
entities.context: Traditional evaluation method based on matching keywords in resumes/descriptions

entities.name: Story-based candidate mapping
entities.context: Method of mapping ideal person descriptions onto the stories candidates tell about themselves

relationships.context: Advocates for semantic over keyword-based candidate evaluation
Contrasting approaches to candidate evaluation - semantic is positioned as superior
The mapping method relies on semantic understanding to match ideal descriptions to candidate narratives
